text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The landform and compass are in harmony...
Now's the time!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Go, White Tiger, Guardian of the West! With
your special ability—

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oh ho ho, not so fast!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah! Ahhh?!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Your affinity with the White Tiger's attributes
wasn't quite there, was it? It looks like I win
again.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Agh! Another loss!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm passing by the cafeteria, I see
Copano Rickey and Wonder Acute playing a card
game that's currently very popular.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
You draw a card, summon characters, and then
make them fight in turns...
choice_data_list: Are card games not in your wheelhouse?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Heh... I don't play this game that
often, so it's not like I'm all that experienced.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And even with the landform and compass aligned,
I just don't have the skills I need to make the
most of my plays.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Yet you still agreed to play with me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Because it looks so fun! I wanted to join in with
everyone else too!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oh, ho ho. That's so like you, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll figure it out after you've played a
few times. Do call me again whenever you'd like
to play something. I'll gladly join you for anything
that's not loud or flashy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come back to my office to find Copano Rickey
perusing some of the cards from before...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Mmm... Learning the rules is hard enough,
but now I have to learn about all these
characters, too...
choice_data_list: Want me to help you out?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the offer! I think I'd prefer to try and
figure it out by myself, though, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Losing all the time is so frustrating, and I want to
actually enjoy playing! I'm going to do my best to
get this down!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...It really is hard, though!
choice_data_list:
Just keep at it while remembering to take
breaks!

How about memorizing them by making
connections between them and something you
know?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Yeah, that's a good strategy! Shall we get
some tea and sweets ready? That's what Acute
would do...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Speaking of Acute...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Your affinity with the White Tiger's attributes
wasn't quite there, was it? It looks like I win
again.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Something I know... For me, that'd definitely be
feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But how can I make that connection? I know some
of the characters are related to feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Your affinity with the White Tiger's attributes
wasn't quite there, was it? It looks like I win
again.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: She did say... "attributes"...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I was focusing on attack power and HP the whole
time, but what about these fire and leaf icons...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh! Ohhh!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
...Well, goodness me. That was like playing
against a different opponent altogether...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yayyy! I finally won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After memorizing the cards with blistering speed,
Copano Rickey goes on to get her revenge!
choice_data_list: How the heck did you do that?
How the heck did you do that?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When Acute mentioned attributes, I realized that
it's basically just an elemental rock-paper-scissors
game!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oho?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Water weakens fire qi, fire weakens metal qi...
And you know how the rest goes!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When I realized the setup was similar to how the
feng shui elements interact, it all fell into place!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
After all, no one knows the ins and outs of feng
shui better than me! I'll never lose this game
again!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, did I drop you a helping hint by accident
earlier on?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: But I'm not surprised you figured it all out. You're such a good girl, Rickey. And very clever. Here you go—have some sweeties.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help wondering if maybe Copano Rickey
can find a way to do anything as long as she can
connect it to feng shui somehow.
